meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates
meta.description: Pre-written comment templates for S-Coin earn and redeem flows
notes: Use placeholders and replace them in the HTML app.
Earn comments must mention item, price, percent, and net S-Coin value.
Redeem comments must mention item, S-Coin used, and redemption value.
Net S-Coin value for earn flow is after 5% deduction.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}
